title: Tobiasnætter
writer: Johan Jacobsen, Kelvin Lindemann, Kaj Møller
actors: Eva Heramb, Berthe Qvistgaard, Henrik Bentzon
plot: Alice is happily married to Christoffer Martensen. She was previously married to Ole Sand. The only thing they could ever agree on was to divorce. But now the hatchet is buried, and now that Ole Sand is in the country, what is mor...
